pages.raw_text:
Editor of The Press: l desire to
reply to DIR. Mark A. Mathews's Of
Seattle attack on women in your
issue of April 1st. He says: "Suf-
frage agitators are female freaks
suffering from male-itis," which he
interprets as "desire-itis.'


OF all the accounts that have
reached me of tomfoolery stunts
performed by foolish freaks on All
Fools Day. the msouni ranting of
the long-haired spectacular preach
er from the sound city is the worst.
Had ! not previously heard some
thing of the opinions on the wom-
ans suffrage question of this indi-
vidual, who claims to be pastor of
one of the largest Protestant
churches in the United States,
would think he was suffering from
NOTCRlTIS. by his attempt to per-
petrate this April Fools joke.


! was once told when in Seattle
that | should 90 to hear Or. Mat
thews, he was ae good as circus.
| replied that had been reared ac-
cordine to Episcopalan methods
and believed in the eternal fitness"
of things; that | preferred my re-
ligious devotion conducted decently
and in order; also that | preferred
to witness circus performances in
q tent with proper Accompaniment.


DR.. MATTHEWS NOT REAL


MAN?


Dr. Mathews says women are
suffering from male-itis and a de
sire to be and do as men do" God
forbid. Intellectual, womanly wo-
men, such as you will find among
the advocates of woman's suffrage,
have no desire to be as some men
are. but wish to help real men with
their vote to make this old world
a better place in which to live. Pre-
vailing conditions prove that men
are unable to cope with the stu
/. alton alone. Realizing their impo-
tency, they are going to place the
ballot in the hands of the wives,
mothers, sisters and daughters of
the nation to aid them in the pro-
lection of the race.


The doctor says the ballot is not
a right but a privilege conferred;
that it has always been restricted
and always will be- The only re-
strictions placed upon the ballot
are those of criminals. idiots, pau
pers and American women. "Oh.
the pity Of it, that self respecting,
self supporting. taXpaying women
must submit to the humiliation OF
